Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — jackets.
Customers may return jackets within 30 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — jackets.
Customers may return jackets within 30 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

Zephyra Outfitters Warranty — jackets.
All jackets sold by Zephyra Outfitters carry a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. The warranty excludes normal wear, misuse, and unauthorized repairs. Warranty claims require the original order number.

Product Guide — Mistcloak Pro.
The Mistcloak Pro is part of our jackets range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

events.content:
The return window for jackets can be found on the jacket category page or by consulting the Product Guide — Mistcloak Pro.

For a more specific answer regarding the exact return policy: Jackets are returned within 30 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Unopened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee, while opened items pay only $7.99 for shipping.

The warranty on jackets is a full 1-year from purchase and covers defects in materials or workmanship.

For more details, please refer to the jacket category page or the Product Guide — Mistcloak Pro.
